name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Disaster for the environment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Yesterday, Donald Trump made a reckless decision to shirk his responsibility to address the stark dangers of climate change.
These dangers threaten our country's economic growth, the health of our citizens, and the state of the planet that we will pass down to our children, grandchildren, and great grandchildren.
To say that I am disappointed and alarmed is to put it mildly -- that's why I need you with me. [**Will you add your name now to condemn Donald Trump's disgraceful decision and renew your commitment to fighting climate change?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb9/2a380d31/1a03c83c/fe8060/4074979303/VEsH/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170602_paris-agreement?source=e20170602_ParisAgreement_act")
To pull out of the Paris Agreement is out of step with environmental and business leaders throughout the country and the world. It undermines our nation's global leadership, and it contradicts the Department of Defense's position that climate change is a threat multiplier around the world.
This decision will also be felt at a personal level. Future generations will inherit dirty drinking water, polluted air, and access to fewer natural resources.
[**This is urgent, everyone. We must do everything in our power to combat the threat of climate change. Add your name to recommit to the fight.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb9/2a380d31/1a03c83c/fe8060/4074979303/VEsE/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170602_paris-agreement?source=e20170602_ParisAgreement_act")
Thank you for doing your part.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb9/2a380d31/1a03c83c/fe8061/4074979303/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGFyaXMtY2xpbWF0ZS1hZ3JlZW1lbnQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDYwMl9QYXJpc0FncmVlbWVudF9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paris-climate-agreement?refcode=e20170602_ParisAgreement_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb9/2a380d31/1a03c83c/fe8062/4074979303/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: wrong direction (add your name)

Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: A bold thing to demand right now
body:
Right now, during the greatest legitimacy crisis our government has ever seen, is precisely the time to do this. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae42/1646738122/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs") Friend, This week I published an op-ed calling for a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ to achieve today what the original VRA of 1965 set out to do: protect the equal right to vote for all. To meet that standard today, we need to go beyond the original VRA and insist on a 50-state pre-clearance requirement to undo and prevent further voter suppression. This is a bold thing to demand at a time when it seems like the deck is more stacked against us in Washington than ever. But right now, when we're in the greatest legitimacy crisis our government has ever seen, is precisely the time we absolutely must demand this. Thousands of your fellow supporters have already signed on to show their support for the _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ , but I didn't see your name on the list. Will you join this effort today? [_**Join thousands of your fellow supporters now. Sign the petition to show your support for a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ today.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae43/1646738122/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Join+thousands+of+your+fellow+supporters&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs") A modern _Voting Rights Act_ must include certain provisions, supplemented by state voting rights legislation if necessary, in order to truly restore legitimacy to our elections:
* Establish an independent Office of Voting Rights, solely to review and approve any proposed changes to voting rights regulations in the country.
* Establish a national standard for ID requirements that states cannot exceed.
* Mandate same-day voter registration.
* Mandate a minimum length of time for early voting.
* Ban any change to voting laws within 90 days of an election.
* Publicize any changes to voting regulations or procedures for a minimum length of time in multiple languages.
* End felony disenfranchisement, which keeps one in 14 Black citizens nationwide from voting but only restrict one in 56 non-Black citizens.
* End partisan gerrymandering so that the voters can choose their officials instead of officials choosing their voters.

Voting is the most important democratic right. Any infringement on the right to vote is a threat to the legitimacy of our democracy. This could be our generation's civil rights moment, our 1965, and we must rise to meet it. We need a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_. The onus is on us to demand one, and on Congress to pass it. [_**Sign the petition to show your support for a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ today.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae40/1646738122/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Sign+the+petition+to+show+your+support+f&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs") Just as the landmark _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ addressed many of the worst voter suppression tactics of its day, like poll taxes and literacy tests, so must the new _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ address modern abuses. Thank you for standing up for our legitimacy, Russ Feingold | [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae41/1646738122/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae7e/1646738122/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae7f/1646738122/VEsA/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs"). | Authorized and paid for by LegitPAC
---

Middleton, WI 53562

[Privacy Policy](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ec/1c469400/2454314/354ae7c/1646738122/VEsB/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/content/legitpac-privacy-policy/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=7+-+Privacy+Policy&utm_campaign=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs&source=20170603_r4w_VRA_msg2_rs")

Thank you for standing up for our legitimacy, Russ Feingold | ""

name: Shailene Woodley, Our Revolution
subject: A crisis of leadership
body:
By allowing billionaires and corporations to buy elections, they have carte blanche to force our government to deny the empirical evidence of climate change.
#
Friends,
This week, our country became the laughingstock of the world when Donald Trump announced his shameful and foolhardy decision to pull the United States out of the Paris climate accord. This administration's commitment to bankrolling fossil fuel industry donors like the Koch brothers is unique in the world. By allowing billionaires and corporations to buy elections, they have carte blanche to force our government to deny the empirical evidence of climate change.
These climate deniers try to spin their greed using excuses like "I am not a scientist," "the earth is made as God intended," and other empty platitudes to deflect any accountability to their own decisions. **I am furious.[We have to defeat the know-nothing, morally bankrupt ideology of the fossil fuel industry and the phony public servants they are propping up, but we can't do it without your help. Can you stand with us by making a $5 donation to fight back against this corrupt oligarchy with a real plan of action to achieve our renewable energy future?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f4/448928389/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/parisclimate?refcode=em170602-full")**
We want to defeat the entire corrupt edifice of profitability in pollution. From the oil, coal, and natural gas industries, to the revenue streams they funnel to major media networks through advertising, to the lobbyist firms and Super PACs, to politicians from the state house to the White House, to the pundits who are more eager to look for a political fight than a solution to a clear and present danger, our environment and our people are being crushed in the final death grip of a dying industry. We have to break free.
Oil, natural gas, and coal are finite. They will run out before the end of this century. By pulling out of the Paris Agreement, Trump has already surrendered America's position as the leader of the free world. If we continue on the course that he's charted for the country, the free world will leave us behind. We'll be left, scratching the dirt where the oil wells and coal mines used to be, wondering where it all went wrong.
[**We should be thinking of opportunity, not Trump's negative and self-defeating outlook on American energy production. Can you chip in $5 to help us defeat the fossil fuel industry with a clean energy alternative to make us 100% renewable by 2050?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f4/448928389/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/parisclimate?refcode=em170602-full")
We don't know exactly how many people will lose their homes to floods, or get sick from air pollution and unclean water. But we do know inaction on climate change will mean more droughts, floods, famines, hurricanes, rising seas, armed conflicts, and extreme weather conditions.
Donald Trump and the Republicans in Congress don't care about any of that. They have nothing more than a hollow, bankrupt ideology fueled by big money interests. We can defeat them. Trillions of dollars, millions of jobs, and a cleaner environment await. It just takes action.
[**If we don't challenge Trump right now, he will continue unabated while he dismantles all of the progress we've worked so hard to achieve. Please make a $5 donation today so we can expand our movement to combat climate change.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f4/448928389/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/parisclimate?refcode=em170602-full")
We're giving this fight everything we've got. Thank you for being there with us.
In solidarity,
Shailene Woodley
Our Revolution Board Member
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f4/448928389/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/parisclimate?refcode=em170602-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f5/448928389/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f2/448928389/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0db4/43f17890/d58b09fd/620375f3/448928389/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Reining in Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb6/2a380d31/1bf3ed1d/fe80b8/1689819840/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb6/2a380d31/1bf3ed1d/fe80b8/1689819840/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
The costs of your prescription drugs are going way up, everyone, and many Washington Republicans aren't doing anything about it.
That's because when pharmaceutical companies charge you more for the prescriptions you rely on, you're being forced to line the pockets of one of the GOP's biggest corporate special interest backers -- Big Pharma.
[**If you believe that we all deserve access to affordable medication and that drug companies should be transparent with their pricing, add your name to hold Big Pharma accountable.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb6/2a380d31/1bf3ed1d/fe80b9/1689819840/VEsF/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drugs/hassan/")
According to _CBS News_ , hard-working Americans like you spent an estimated $450 billion on prescription drugs last year, and a report from _NBC News_ found that prescription drug spending for Blue Cross and Blue Shield members has seen an overall rise of 73% since 2010.
Senator Hassan is fighting to rein in Big Pharma and bring down prescription drug prices, but she needs to know that you support this fight. [**Add your name to join her and tell Washington Republicans to rein in abuses by pharmaceutical corporations.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb6/2a380d31/1bf3ed1d/fe80b9/1689819840/VEsC/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drugs/hassan/")
Thanks for speaking out about this life-saving issue.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb6/2a380d31/1bf3ed1d/fe80ba/1689819840/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDYwM19QaGFybWFfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170603_Pharma_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb6/2a380d31/1bf3ed1d/fe80bb/1689819840/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Concord, NH 03302 United States

That's because when pharmaceutical companies charge you more for the prescriptions you rely on, you're being forced to line the pockets of one of the GOP's biggest corporate special interest backers -- Big Pharma. "" According to CBS News , hard-working Americans like you spent an estimated $450 billion on prescription drugs last year, and a report from NBC News found that prescription drug spending for Blue Cross and Blue Shield members has seen an overall rise of 73% since 2010.
